title: Dashboard InfoWindow Report List Enhancement
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the Dashboard InfoWindow to go directly to the report list, deduplicate entries, and include a green icon to open the report detail in DataTools, so that I can quickly browse associated reports.
description:
Enhances the Dashboard InfoWindow (popup showing reports associated with a dashboard) with three improvements:

1. Skip the intermediate box view and go directly to the flat report list
2. Deduplicate the report list to avoid showing the same report multiple times
3. Add a green arrow icon next to each report that opens the report detail in the DataTools Pro right-side panel (InfoWindow)
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard InfoWindow opens directly to the flat report list without the intermediate box view
Green arrow icon next to each report opens the report detail in the right popup window
ux_changes: InfoWindow skips box view, shows deduplicated flat report list. Green arrow icon opens report detail in right popup.
middleware_changes: Report list query deduplicated before returning to frontend.
comment_summary: Developer requested elaboration, then implemented with a green arrow icon that opens the report in the right popup window. Pushed for review.
